caption: A man wearing a light-colored shirt and a patterned shawl is speaking into an ANI-branded microphone in an outdoor setting with greenery and other people in the background. He is the central figure across all frames, while images of other men and text overlays appear on the screen. To his left is a photo of a man with text reading "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार", and to his right is text identifying "विजेन्द्र यादव" and "श्रवण कुमार" under the label "मंत्री". A red banner at the bottom contains the text "जे. पी. नड्डा: बिहार ने NDA को बहुमत दिया था". A red bar at the top changes from "2024" to "2024 में JDU के" and then to "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?". A small "MAHARODH" logo and a time stamp, which progresses from "10:05 PM" to "10:06 PM", are visible in the bottom right.
